creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #11)
> Thanks, I was able to reproduce the bug with MK_SYSTEM_COMPILER=no.
> 
> Do I also need to set that in buildworld or is it relevant only when
> installworld'ing from my laptop?

Only for installworld. So pass that as well with my patch when installing.
